title: More Debug Info!
description: Adds additional options for your F3/debug menu.
body:
More Debug Info! is a mod for Fabric and NeoForge that provides additional inspections for the Minecraft F3/debug screen.

Inspections provided by this mod, along with a whole bunch of built-in ones, are hidden by default. You can open the customization options for your debug screen by pressing the F3 and F6 keys together.

![Minecraft F3 screen, displaying a list of "Detected Custom Payloads". The list contains: minecraft:brand, badlion:mods, and hypixel:hello.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06ad52f93e0a9d2c1a316e6d5531a87eca3b4ab9_0.webp)

## List of inspections (as of 3.0.0)
| Name | ID | Description |
|-|-|-|
|Custom payloads|`moref3:custom_payloads`|Displays a list of identifiers used in custom payloads sent by the server.|
|Loaded players|`moref3:loaded_players`|Displays a list of players in the currently loaded area.|
|Block energy level|`moref3:block_energy`|(Requires mod to be installed on server) Shows the energy level, maximum capacity, and energy system used by the targeted block.|
